description_long: This is a menacing, emaciated dog with a gaunt, angular body and pronounced ribs, giving it a skeletal appearance. Its fur is patchy and mottled with dark brown, reddish, and black tones, creating a distressed, almost burned look. The head is wedge-shaped with pricked, sharply pointed ears and a long, narrow snout, while the eyes appear pale and haunting. The legs are thin and bony, with visible joints and an unnatural, rigid stance. The tail is short and straight, held low and close to the body. Overall, the dog exudes an eerie, unsettling presence, reminiscent of a Doberman or similar breed in a distressed state.
description: A gaunt, skeletal dog with patchy, dark mottled fur, pointed ears, and a haunting, emaciated appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow, angular face, pricked ears, and thin, bony legs with a direct, intimidating gaze.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the pronounced ribs, sunken flanks, and the straight, low tail.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the narrow hips, visible spine, and the short, straight tail.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the gaunt body, pointed ears, and open mouth with visible teeth.
